{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Mantle of the Reaper
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Mantle of the Reaper]] allows [[Ozriel]] to extend his authority and grants him more power.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
